controls.control_objective: To ensure have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too
controls.control_description:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a
range of other risk categories too.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc')
controls.control_description:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an NBFC'),
subject to layer-wise applicability:
<image>
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory structure for
1Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc')

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable exclusively to 'notified nbfcs' as defined in chapter iii - 'credit risk evaluation' of these directions
controls.control_description:
1[Provided that, paragraphs 6 through 8 of these Directions shall be applicable exclusively
to 'Notified NBFCs' as defined in Chapter III - 'Credit Risk Evaluation' of these Directions.]
(2) 2[*****]
(3) These Directions are not applicable for the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable exclusively to 'notified nbfcs' as defined in chapter iii - 'credit risk evaluation' of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a bilateral derivative contract on one or more reference assets in which the protection buyer pays a fee through the life of the contract in retu
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Credit Default Swap (CDS)' shall mean a bilateral derivative contract on one or
more reference assets in which the protection buyer pays a fee through the life of
the contract in return for a credit event payment by the protection seller following
a credit event of the reference entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a bilateral derivative contract on one or more reference assets in which the protection buyer pays a fee through the life of the contract in retu

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a committee of the board of the nbfc entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties
controls.control_description:
4[(ia) 'Committee on lending to related parties' shall mean a committee of the Board of
the NBFC entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a committee of the board of the nbfc entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also identify any existing committee, other than the audit committee, for this purpose
controls.control_description:
NBFCs may also
identify any existing Committee, other than the Audit Committee, for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also identify any existing committee, other than the audit committee, for this purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as specified in section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(ib) 'Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as specified in section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(27) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(ic) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the
Companies Act, 2013.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(27) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the amount which is payable by the credit protection seller to the credit protection buyer under the terms of the credit derivative contract foll
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'Credit event payment' shall mean the amount which is payable by the credit
protection seller to the credit protection buyer under the terms of the credit
derivative contract following the occurrence of a credit event.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the amount which is payable by the credit protection seller to the credit protection buyer under the terms of the credit derivative contract foll

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only in the form of physical settlement (payment of par in exchange for physical delivery of a deliverable obligation)
controls.control_description:
The payment shall
be only in the form of physical settlement (payment of par in exchange for physical
delivery of a deliverable obligation).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only in the form of physical settlement (payment of par in exchange for physical delivery of a deliverable obligation)

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any obligation (as per master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022) of the reference entity which shall be delivered, under the terms of the contract
controls.control_description:
(iii) 'Deliverable asset / obligation' shall mean any obligation (as per Master Direction
- Reserve Bank of India (Credit Derivatives) Directions, 2022) of the reference
entity which shall be delivered, under the terms of the contract, if a credit event
4Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any obligation (as per master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022) of the reference entity which shall be delivered, under the terms of the contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a director appointed/elected to the board of the entity
controls.control_description:
5[(iiia) 'Director of an NBFC or any other entity' shall mean a director appointed/elected
to the Board of the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a director appointed/elected to the board of the entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person' other than an individual and a hindu undivided family
controls.control_description:
(iiib) 'Entity' in the context of a 'related party' shall mean a 'person' other than an individual
and a Hindu Undivided Family.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person' other than an individual and a hindu undivided family

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(51) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(iiic) 'Key Managerial Personnel (KMP)' of a NBFC shall have the same meaning as
defined in Section 2(51) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(51) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean extending funded or/ and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties
controls.control_description:
(iiid) 'Lending' in the context of a 'related party' shall mean extending funded or/ and non-
fund-based credit facilities to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean extending funded or/ and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded
controls.control_description:
While investments in debt instruments
of related parties shall be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be
excluded.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person holding 10 per cent or more of the paid- up share capital or ₹5 crore in paid-up shares, whichever is less
controls.control_description:
(iv) 'Major shareholder' shall mean a person holding 10 per cent or more of the paid-
up share capital or ₹5 crore in paid-up shares, whichever is less.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person holding 10 per cent or more of the paid- up share capital or ₹5 crore in paid-up shares, whichever is less

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 3 (23) of
controls.control_description: 6[(iva) 'Person' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 3 (23) of

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under banking statistics (harmonised definitions)
controls.control_description:
(ivb) 'Personal Loans' shall have the same meaning as defined under Banking Statistics
(Harmonised Definitions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined under banking statistics (harmonised definitions)

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude loans for investments in financial assets
controls.control_description:
However, for these Directions, personal loans shall
exclude loans for investments in financial assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude loans for investments in financial assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(ivc) 'Promoter' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the
Companies Act, 2013.]
5Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(69) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the obligation (as per master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022) used to calculate the amount payable when
controls.control_description:
(v) 'Reference obligation' shall mean the obligation (as per Master Direction - Reserve
Bank of India (Credit Derivatives) Directions, 2022) used to calculate the amount
payable when a credit event occurs under the terms of a credit derivative contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the obligation (as per master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022) used to calculate the amount payable when

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a related person, or any of the following entities:
controls.control_description:
7[(va) 'Related Party' with respect to a NBFC shall mean a related person, or any of the
following entities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a related person, or any of the following entities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in cases where the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement
controls.control_description:
Provided that, nothing sub-clause (e) above shall apply in cases where the authority to
nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in cases where the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the advice, directions or instructions given in a professional capacity
controls.control_description:
7Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026
<image>
Provided further that, nothing in sub-clause (f) above shall apply to the advice, directions
or instructions given in a professional capacity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the advice, directions or instructions given in a professional capacity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as related parties to a government-owned nbfc just by virtue of the fact that the government has the common ownership or control of such en
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, Government of India / State Government-owned or controlled
entities shall not be treated as related parties to a government-owned NBFC just by virtue
of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as related parties to a government-owned nbfc just by virtue of the fact that the government has the common ownership or control of such en

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person, and the relatives of such a person
controls.control_description:
(vb) 'Related Person' with respect to a NBFC shall mean a person, and the relatives of
such a person, where the person:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person, and the relatives of such a person

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (77) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 8[ and rules framed therein]
controls.control_description:
(vi) 'Relative' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Clause (77) of
Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013 8[ and rules framed therein].
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (77) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 8[ and rules framed therein]

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the asset/obligation which a protection buyer is seeking to hedge
controls.control_description:
(viii) 'Underlying asset / obligation' shall mean the asset/obligation which a protection
buyer is seeking to hedge.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the asset/obligation which a protection buyer is seeking to hedge

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meanings as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regula
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meanings as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or
re-enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank, or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meanings as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regula

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board approved policies covering, inter alia, the areas specified in subsequent chapters of these directions, to the extent such activiti
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall put in place Board approved policies covering, inter alia, the areas
specified in subsequent chapters of these Directions, to the extent such activities
are undertaken by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board approved policies covering, inter alia, the areas specified in subsequent chapters of these directions, to the extent such activiti

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out their independent and objective credit appraisal in all cases of lending and must not depend on credit appraisal reports prepared by outside
controls.control_description:
Notified NBFCs shall carry out their independent and objective credit appraisal in
all cases of lending and must not depend on credit appraisal reports prepared by
outside consultants, especially the in-house consultants of the borrowing entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out their independent and objective credit appraisal in all cases of lending and must not depend on credit appraisal reports prepared by outside

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out sensitivity tests / scenario analysis, especially for infrastructure projects, which shall, inter alia, include project delays and cost over
controls.control_description:
They shall carry out sensitivity tests / scenario analysis, especially for infrastructure
projects, which shall, inter alia, include project delays and cost overruns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out sensitivity tests / scenario analysis, especially for infrastructure projects, which shall, inter alia, include project delays and cost over

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the source and quality of equity capital brought in by the promoters / shareholders
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall ascertain the source and quality of equity capital
brought in by the promoters / shareholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain the source and quality of equity capital brought in by the promoters / shareholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure at the time of credit appraisal that debt of the parent company is not infused as equity capital of the subsidiary / spv
controls.control_description:
Therefore, NBFCs shall ensure at the time of credit appraisal that debt
of the parent company is not infused as equity capital of the subsidiary / SPV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure at the time of credit appraisal that debt of the parent company is not infused as equity capital of the subsidiary / spv

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify as to whether the names of any of the directors of the companies appear in the list of defaulters by way of reference to din / pan etc
controls.control_description:
While carrying out the credit appraisal, notified NBFCs shall verify as to whether
the names of any of the directors of the companies appear in the list of defaulters
by way of reference to DIN / PAN etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify as to whether the names of any of the directors of the companies appear in the list of defaulters by way of reference to din / pan etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking declaration from the borrowing company
controls.control_description:
Further, in case of any doubt arising on
account of identical names, NBFCs shall use independent sources for confirmation
of the identity of directors rather than seeking declaration from the borrowing
company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking declaration from the borrowing company

controls.control_objective: To ensure with a view to ensuring proper end- use of funds and preventing diversion / siphoning of funds by the borrowers, nbfcs could consider engaging their o
controls.control_description:
In addition to the above, notified NBFCs shall with a view to ensuring proper end-
use of funds and preventing diversion / siphoning of funds by the borrowers,
NBFCs could consider engaging their own auditors for such specific certification
purpose without relying on certification given by borrower's auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to with a view to ensuring proper end- use of funds and preventing diversion / siphoning of funds by the borrowers, nbfcs could consider engaging their o

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean nbfc- factors, nbfc-d and non-deposit taking nbfcs of asset size of ₹500 crore and above
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purpose of this Chapter, 'Notified NBFCs' shall mean NBFC-
Factors, NBFC-D and non-deposit taking NBFCs of asset size of ₹500 crore and
above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean nbfc- factors, nbfc-d and non-deposit taking nbfcs of asset size of ₹500 crore and above

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b
controls.control_description:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable
mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related
parties by the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a NBFC, as required in terms of
the extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties
controls.control_description:
The policy shall
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the nbfc and their relatives
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'Specified employees'
of the NBFC and their relatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the nbfc and their relatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns a
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns a

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties
controls.control_description: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties
controls.control_description:
Within
this aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and
a group of related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential
exposure limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than the following ceilings: category of nbfcs materiality threshold upper layer and top layer ₹10 crore middle layer ₹5 crore base layer ₹1
controls.control_description:
However, such loans, including personal loans to directors or a KMP,
shall be subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy, which shall not
be higher than the following ceilings:
Category of NBFCs Materiality Threshold
Upper Layer and Top Layer ₹10 crore
Middle Layer ₹5 crore
Base Layer ₹1 crore
Layer of the NBFC shall be based on the last audited balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be higher than the following ceilings: category of nbfcs materiality threshold upper layer and top layer ₹10 crore middle layer ₹5 crore base layer ₹1

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply at individual transaction level
controls.control_description: For loans, materiality threshold shall apply at individual transaction level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply at individual transaction level

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary for different categories of loans to related parties and borrowers subject to ceilings prescribed above
controls.control_description:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties
and borrowers subject to ceilings prescribed above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vary for different categories of loans to related parties and borrowers subject to ceilings prescribed above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned by the board of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned by the
Board of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned by the board of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure delegate the above powers of lending beyond the materiality threshold to a committee of the board (hereafter called committee) other than the audit co
controls.control_description:
However, a NBFC at its discretion, may delegate the above
powers of lending beyond the materiality threshold to a Committee of the Board
(hereafter called Committee) other than the Audit Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to delegate the above powers of lending beyond the materiality threshold to a committee of the board (hereafter called committee) other than the audit co

controls.control_objective: To ensure recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties
controls.control_description:
Directors, KMP, or Specified employees shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri
controls.control_description:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w
controls.control_description:
A NBFC shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loans sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Credit facilities sanctioned to 'specified employees' and their relatives shall be
reported to the Board on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re
controls.control_description:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board or to the board
controls.control_description:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board or to the Board,
where Audit Committees are not formed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board or to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure always be treated as lending to related party
controls.control_description:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the NBFC or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always be treated as lending to related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to comply with the applicable provisions of the securities <image> and exchange board of india (listing obligations and disclosure requiremen
controls.control_description:
In addition to the provisions of these Directions on lending to related parties, listed
NBFCs shall continue to comply with the applicable provisions of the Securities
<image>
and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)
Regulations, 2015, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to comply with the applicable provisions of the securities <image> and exchange board of india (listing obligations and disclosure requiremen

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in imposition of supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
imposition of supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in imposition of supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r
controls.control_description:
These penalties may include imposition of monetary penalty,
requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises,
forensic audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions
as deemed fit.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

controls.control_objective: To ensure lend against its own shares
controls.control_description: An NBFC shall not lend against its own shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lend against its own shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued either by way of private placement or public issue)
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall not extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued
either by way of private placement or public issue).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued either by way of private placement or public issue)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from the applicability of the instruction
controls.control_description:
Tax exempt bonds offered by an
NBFC shall be exempted from the applicability of the instruction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from the applicability of the instruction

controls.control_objective: To ensure only participate in cds market as a user
controls.control_description: An NBFC shall only participate in CDS market as a user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only participate in cds market as a user

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as a user, buy credit protection only to hedge their credit risk on corporate bonds they hold
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall, as a
user, buy credit protection only to hedge their credit risk on corporate bonds they
hold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , as a user, buy credit protection only to hedge their credit risk on corporate bonds they hold

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell protection and hence shall not enter into short positions in the cds contracts
controls.control_description:
It shall not sell protection and hence shall not enter into short positions in the
CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell protection and hence shall not enter into short positions in the cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure exit their bought cds positions by unwinding them with the original counterparty or by assigning them in favour of buyer of the underlying bond or by
controls.control_description:
It shall exit their bought CDS positions by unwinding them with the
original counterparty or by assigning them in favour of buyer of the underlying bond
or by assigning the contract to any other eligible market participant through
novation (only in case of events such as winding-up or mergers / acquisitions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exit their bought cds positions by unwinding them with the original counterparty or by assigning them in favour of buyer of the underlying bond or by

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as a user, also ensure that the guidelines including operational requirements for cds as provided below, are fulfilled by it
controls.control_description:
Apart from complying with all the provisions above, an NBFC shall, as a user, also
ensure that the guidelines including operational requirements for CDS as provided
below, are fulfilled by it.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , as a user, also ensure that the guidelines including operational requirements for cds as provided below, are fulfilled by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure both be defined conservatively
controls.control_description:
(1) Operational requirements for CDS
Definition of maturity - the maturity of the underlying exposure and
the maturity of the hedge shall both be defined conservatively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to both be defined conservatively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be gauged as the longest possible remaining time before the counterparty is scheduled to fulfil its obligation, taking into account any applicable gra
controls.control_description:
The
effective maturity of the underlying shall be gauged as the longest
possible remaining time before the counterparty is scheduled to fulfil
its obligation, taking into account any applicable grace period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be gauged as the longest possible remaining time before the counterparty is scheduled to fulfil its obligation, taking into account any applicable gra

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent a direct claim on the protection seller and shall be explicitly referenced to specific exposure, so that the extent of the cover is clearly
controls.control_description:
(i) A CDS contract shall represent a direct claim on the protection seller
and shall be explicitly referenced to specific exposure, so that the
extent of the cover is clearly defined and incontrovertible.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent a direct claim on the protection seller and shall be explicitly referenced to specific exposure, so that the extent of the cover is clearly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be irrevocable
controls.control_description:
(ii) Other than non-payment by a protection buyer of premium in respect
of the credit protection contract, it shall be irrevocable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be irrevocable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no clause in the contract that shall allow the protection seller unilaterally to cancel the credit cover or that would increase the effective cost
controls.control_description:
(iii) There shall be no clause in the contract that shall allow the protection
seller unilaterally to cancel the credit cover or that would increase the
effective cost of cover as a result of deteriorating credit quality in the
hedged exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no clause in the contract that shall allow the protection seller unilaterally to cancel the credit cover or that would increase the effective cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be unconditional
controls.control_description: (iv) The CDS contract shall be unconditional;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be unconditional

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no clause in the protection contract outside the direct control of the nbfc that could prevent the protection seller from being obliged to pay out
controls.control_description:
there shall be no clause in
the protection contract outside the direct control of the NBFC that
could prevent the protection seller from being obliged to pay out in a
timely manner in the event that the original counterparty fails to make
the payment(s) due.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no clause in the protection contract outside the direct control of the nbfc that could prevent the protection seller from being obliged to pay out

controls.control_description:
(v) The credit events specified by the contracting parties shall at a
minimum cover:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed
controls.control_description:
(d) when the restructuring of the underlying obligation is not covered
by the CDS, but the other requirements in paragraph 17 are met,
partial recognition of the CDS shall be allowed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed under paragraph 17(1)(x)
controls.control_description:
(vi) If the CDS specifies deliverable obligations that are different from the
underlying obligation, the resultant asset mismatch shall be
governed under paragraph 17(1)(x).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed under paragraph 17(1)(x)

controls.control_objective: To ensure terminate prior to expiration of any grace period required for a default on the underlying obligation to occur as a result of a failure to pay
controls.control_description:
(vii) The CDS shall not terminate prior to expiration of any grace period
required for a default on the underlying obligation to occur as a result
of a failure to pay.

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural ba
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of
₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding
Regional Rural Banks), Local Area Banks, Small Finance Banks, and Primary
(Urban) Co-operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial
Institutions and NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all fund based and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / fis to the borrower
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Exposure' for this purpose shall include all fund based and non-fund
based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all fund based and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / fis to the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Aggregate sanctioned limit or outstanding balance, whichever is higher, shall be
reckoned for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the position of aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or central repository of information on large credits (c
controls.control_description:
Lenders shall ascertain the position of aggregate
exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository
of Information on Large Credits (CRILC) database or declaration obtained from
the borrower
20.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit
(LOU) shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal
/ enhancement of any existing exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from this provision
controls.control_description:
However, Departments / Agencies of
Central and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under
Companies Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be
exempted from this provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from this provision

controls.control_objective: To ensure encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as
well as all subsidiaries and associates.

27.

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
